component.name: Open Apollo USB Mixer
component.summary: Headphone monitor and preamp controls for Apollo Solo USB

description.p: Standalone Libadwaita utility for Universal Audio Apollo Solo USB. Adjusts phantom power, mic/line, gain, experimental PAD/low-cut bits, and Apollo headphone monitor level over USB control transfers on the default endpoint (EP0) so PipeWire and ALSA keep using the device normally.
